betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Heavy Magnetic Storage Tank§f safely contains §bAntimatter§f.

§eTask:§f Craft 1x §bOrbus Tank§f (machine_orbus)

§c§4CRITICAL:§f
§cOnly this tank can store antimatter!§f
Standard tanks cause annihilation → catastrophic explosion.

§eFunction:§f
• Magnetic containment fields prevent matter contact
• Essential for antimatter operations
• Also stores other exotic fluids safely

§eUses:§f
• Store antimatter from Particle Accelerator
• Buffer for BF Rocket Fuel production
• Required for any antimatter work

§aTip:§f Build this BEFORE producing antimatter - no exceptions!
